name: Pistachio-Almond Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat sugar, oil, almond extract, and eggs with a spoon until well blended.
3. Stir in flour, pistachios, almonds, baking powder, soda, and salt. Place dough on a floured surface; roll it out to coat completely.
4. Knead dough 20 times.
5. Divide dough into two halves. Wrap one half in plastic wrap; reserve. Shape the remaining half of dough into a rectangle measuring 10x3x1/2 inches on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow cooling on the cookie sheet for 15 minutes.
7. Cut crosswise into 1/2 inch slices. Place slices with cut sides down on the cookie sheet. Bake for about 14 minutes, turning once, until crisp and light brown. Remove immediately from the cookie sheet; cool completely on a wire rack.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 with the remaining half of dough.
9. In a 1-quart saucepan, heat chocolate and shortening over low heat until melted and smooth. Place biscotti, cut side up, on waxed paper. Drizzle chocolate mixture over one side of each biscotti. Allow to stand until firm.
Makes 3 dozen.
